diarized_transcript:
[Agent] Thank you for calling HoYoverse Player Support! How can I help you today?
[Caller] Hey, I bought a 49 dollar Genesis Crystal pack through my PSN last night and the crystals still haven't landed. It's been almost 20 hours.
[Agent] Oh, that is frustrating, and I'm sorry you've been waiting on those. Let's get this sorted. Can I start with your UID?
[Caller] 603245891.
[Agent] Thank you. And just for security, could you confirm the HoYoverse email on the account?
[Caller] mchen at email dot com.
[Agent] Perfect, you're verified. I see the order, ORD202604190007, 49.99 USD on April 19th via PSN. Payment cleared with Sony, but the delivery flagged as pending on our side. This one actually tends to happen when the PSN entitlement webhook is delayed. Totally on our end, not yours.
[Caller] Ah okay, good to know.
[Agent] I'm running the delivery retry now, and I'll also verbally read back what you should receive so we confirm together. You should see 3280 Genesis Crystals within about 60 seconds. Can you peek at your in-game mail?
[Caller] Yeah, hold on. Okay, they're here.
[Agent] Wonderful. While I have you, one quick tip, if you turn on the login notification email in your HoYoverse account settings, you'll also get a receipt email confirming crystal delivery whenever you top up on PSN, so if this ever happens again you'll know within about 90 seconds instead of hours. Totally optional.
[Caller] Oh that's handy, I'll set that up.
[Agent] Great. Anything else on your mind?
[Caller] No, that was exactly what I needed.
[Agent] Thanks for your patience, Marcus. Have a great adventure in Teyvat!
